providers.name: Boltsparts / BOLTS
providers.strategy: Mirror .blt data files and FreeCAD backend generators, then match catalog entries by standard code to BOLTS class IDs.
providers.licenseNote: Repository is GPL-3.0; individual .blt data headers are LGPL 2.1+. Review mirrored license files before redistribution.

providers.name: TraceParts
providers.strategy: Record candidate search URLs and direct downloads only when public access and terms allow it.
providers.licenseNote: Many downloads require account/session approval; mark as blocked_auth when not directly downloadable.

providers.strategy: Record candidate search URLs and direct downloads only when public access and terms allow it.
providers.licenseNote: Many downloads require account/session approval; mark as blocked_auth when not directly downloadable.
